# warmup

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Declared heavy boot warm-up category: defineWarmup registers a deferred, throttled, scope-gated warm-up; drainWarmups drains them after onAllReady under a concurrency gate + heavy-read slot + macrotask yield.
- Server:
  - Uses:
    - `infra/host-read-pool.withHeavyReadSlot`
    - `infra/paths.isMain`
  - Exports (types): `WarmupSpec`
  - Exports (values):
    - `defineWarmup`
    - `drainWarmups`
    - `WARMUP_CONCURRENCY`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by:
    - `apps/pages/content-search`
    - `apps/sonata/sources/midi/folders`
    - `infra/corpus-index`
    - `plugin-meta/plugin-tree`
    - `reports`
    - `stats/cost`
    - `tasks`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
